title: origanum aciculare
intro: Origanum aciculare, also known as needle-leafed oregano, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region and is a member of the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can help to combat infections and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Origanum aciculare include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Origanum aciculare include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall health and well-being.
